subject: [PATCH v2 21/21] nfsd: drop the stateid, not the stateowner, on seqid_op replay retry

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFSv4 state management code where an incorrect reference was being dropped, leading to a potential use-after-free and refcount underflow issue. The fix involves dropping the correct reference (the stid) instead of the stateowner when retrying a replay operation. This ensures that the stateowner remains alive through its reference held by the stid, mirroring the behavior in the open path.
